basic_details.job_title: FDDI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief Engineer & Superintending Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Footwear Design & Development Institute (FDDI) is described in the notification as an "Institution of National Importance" under the aegis of the Ministry of Commerce & Industry, Government of India. Through Advertisement No. FDDI/ADV/3/2026 dated 17 July 2026, FDDI has invited online applications from experienced professionals for two non-academic positions at its Head Office under the Engineering and Maintenance (Project) department, Projects domain.

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: B.E / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks from a recognized University/Institute
post_wise_qualification.desirable: M.E / M.Tech / M.Sc (Eng.) in Civil Engineering

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: B.E / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks from a recognized University/Institute
post_wise_qualification.desirable: M.E / M.Tech / M.Sc (Eng.) in Civil Engineering

qualification.details: Eligibility for both posts is based on educational qualification and years of relevant work experience, as detailed below. Both posts fall under the Engineering and Maintenance (Project) department, Projects domain, and both require a background in Civil Engineering. | The notification clarifies that the minimum qualification mentioned should be from a recognized University/Institution. | Chief Engineer (E7) - Essential Work Experience: | At least 22 years of experience in planning, designing, organizing, and controlling civil infrastructure, including handling at least 5 civil construction projects Knowledge and experience in managing the tendering process Experience in preparation of work estimates and in-depth knowledge of CPWD Manuals Experience in civil maintenance works | Chief Engineer (E7) - Desirable Work Experience: | Experience in handling modification works in old civil projects Experience in coordination and monitoring of projects centrally for multiple locations Experience in supervising civil, electrical, and mechanical maintenance works at multiple locations Proven leadership quality | Superintending Engineer (E6) - Essential Work Experience: | At least 20 years of experience in planning, designing, organizing, and controlling civil infrastructure, including handling at least 5 civil construction projects Knowledge and experience in managing the tendering process Experience in preparation of work estimates and in-depth knowledge of CPWD Manuals Experience in civil maintenance works | Superintending Engineer (E6) - Desirable Work Experience: | Experience in handling modification works in old civil projects Experience in coordination and monitoring of projects centrally for multiple locations Experience in supervising civil, electrical, and mechanical maintenance works at multiple locations Proven leadership quality

salary_details.details: The notification mentions the compensation as "Minimum Monthly CTI" (Cost to Institute), not a traditional pay-scale/ pay-matrix. | As per the notification, the monthly CTI includes: | Basic Pay House Rent Allowance (HRA) Special Allowance Provident Fund Leave Encashment benefit Leave Travel Concession (LTC) Reimbursement of mobile phone expenses Reimbursement of medical expenditure Gratuity

selection_process: The notification states that recruitment will be done through written test/interview. It further clarifies:

Merely meeting the job requirements does not entitle a candidate to be called for an interview. FDDI reserves the right to reject any application without assigning a reason. FDDI may increase or decrease the number of posts based on requirement. FDDI may raise the standard of specifications to limit the number of candidates called for the written test/interview. The decision of Management regarding selection will be final. No Transport Allowance or Daily Allowance will be paid for attending the interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be intimated about the interview through email or post.
Specific details such as the written test syllabus
or interview date are not mentioned in the official notification.
how_to_apply: The official notification lays out the following application steps:
Visit the official FDDI career page: https://www.fddiindia.com/career.php
Register and fill in the online application form for the desired post.
Upload all documents required for the respective position, as mentioned in the online application form.
Submit the application before the online registration closes on 16 August 2026, 11:59 PM.
Only online registered applications will be accepted; the notification does not mention any offline application mode.

rows.details: Long-term contract basis (3 to 5 years), extendable

content_sections.heading: FDDI Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: The notification states that only online registered applications will be accepted. No offline or postal applications are mentioned in the notification.

content_sections.heading: FDDI Recruitment 2026 Eligibility
content_sections.text: Eligibility for both posts is based on educational qualification and years of relevant work experience, as detailed below. Both posts fall under the Engineering and Maintenance (Project) department, Projects domain, and both require a background in Civil Engineering. The notification clarifies that the minimum qualification mentioned should be from a recognized University/Institution. Chief Engineer (E7) - Essential Work Experience: At least 22 years of experience in planning, designing, organizing, and controlling civil infrastructure, including handling at least 5 civil construction projects Knowledge and experience in managing the tendering process Experience in preparation of work estimates and in-depth knowledge of CPWD Manuals Experience in civil maintenance works Chief Engineer (E7) - Desirable Work Experience: Experience in handling modification works in old civil projects Experience in coordination and monitoring of projects centrally for multiple locations Experience in supervising civil, electrical, and mechanical maintenance works at multiple locations Proven leadership quality Superintending Engineer (E6) - Essential Work Experience: At least 20 years of experience in planning, designing, organizing, and controlling civil infrastructure, including handling at least 5 civil construction projects Knowledge and experience in managing the tendering process Experience in preparation of work estimates and in-depth knowledge of CPWD Manuals Experience in civil maintenance works Superintending Engineer (E6) - Desirable Work Experience: Experience in handling modification works in old civil projects Experience in coordination and monitoring of projects centrally for multiple locations Experience in supervising civil, electrical, and mechanical maintenance works at multiple locations Proven leadership quality

rows.essential_qualification: B.E / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks from a recognized University/Institute
rows.desirable_qualification: M.E / M.Tech / M.Sc (Eng.) in Civil Engineering

rows.essential_qualification: B.E / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks from a recognized University/Institute
rows.desirable_qualification: M.E / M.Tech / M.Sc (Eng.) in Civil Engineering

content_sections.heading: FDDI Recruitment 2026 Salary
content_sections.text: The notification mentions the compensation as "Minimum Monthly CTI" (Cost to Institute), not a traditional pay-scale/ pay-matrix. As per the notification, the monthly CTI includes: Basic Pay House Rent Allowance (HRA) Special Allowance Provident Fund Leave Encashment benefit Leave Travel Concession (LTC) Reimbursement of mobile phone expenses Reimbursement of medical expenditure Gratuity

content_sections.heading: FDDI Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The notification states that recruitment will be done through written test/interview . It further clarifies: Merely meeting the job requirements does not entitle a candidate to be called for an interview. FDDI reserves the right to reject any application without assigning a reason. FDDI may increase or decrease the number of posts based on requirement. FDDI may raise the standard of specifications to limit the number of candidates called for the written test/interview. The decision of Management regarding selection will be final. No Transport Allowance or Daily Allowance will be paid for attending the interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be intimated about the interview through email or post. Specific details such as the written test syllabus, exam pattern, or interview date are not mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: FDDI Recruitment 2026 Required Documents
content_sections.text: Based on the general conditions in the notification, applicants should keep the following documents ready for upload during online registration: Educational certificates/mark sheets proving the essential (and desirable, if applicable) qualification Proof of relevant work experience matching the essential and desirable criteria for the applied post A copy of the category certificate (SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Ex-servicemen) issued by the competent authority, as prescribed by the Government of India — applicable only to candidates belonging to these categories No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the current employer — mandatory for applicants currently working in Government Organisations or Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs) Any other documents mentioned as required in the respective online application form for the post applied for The exact document list is confirmed to be shown "in the online form for the respective positions," per the notification; applicants should check the online form at the time of applying.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for FDDI Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The official notification lays out the following application steps: Visit the official FDDI career page: https://www.fddiindia.com/career.php Register and fill in the online application form for the desired post. Upload all documents required for the respective position, as mentioned in the online application form. Submit the application before the online registration closes on 16 August 2026, 11:59 PM. Only online registered applications will be accepted; the notification does not mention any offline application mode.

faq.question: Q1. What is the advertisement number for this FDDI recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is FDDI/ADV/3/2026, dated 17 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. Which posts are being recruited under FDDI/ADV/3/2026?
faq.answer: FDDI is recruiting for Chief Engineer (Post Code E7) and Superintending Engineer (Post Code E6) under the Engineering and Maintenance (Project) department, Projects domain, at the Head Office.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online registration closes on 16 August 2026 at 11:59 PM. This is also the last date to submit the online application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for FDDI Chief Engineer and Superintending Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Both posts require a B.E / B.Tech / B.Sc in Civil Engineering with a minimum of 50% marks from a recognized University/Institute. An M.E / M.Tech / M.Sc (Eng.) in Civil Engineering is listed as a desirable qualification.

faq.question: Q5. How many years of experience are required for the FDDI Chief Engineer post?
faq.answer: At least 22 years of relevant experience is required for the Chief Engineer post, including handling at least 5 civil construction projects, as per the essential work experience criteria in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the upper age limit for FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 55 years for both posts, as on the release date of the advertisement. Age relaxation applies as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No. The notification states that all advertised posts are on a long-term contract basis of 3 to 5 years, extendable based on FDDI's requirement and the candidate's performance.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for FDDI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must register and apply online at https://www.fddiindia.com/career.php, filling in the application form and uploading the required documents for the respective post.
